description: A deep-cleansing and purifying treatment designed to clear breakouts, reduce inflammation, and prevent future congestion. Includes gentle exfoliation, extractions, and soothing care to calm irritation and restore a clearer, healthier complexion.
Gently revitalizes tired, lackluster skin for a fresh and healthy glow. Improves overall clarity and smoothness, leaving the complexion bright and refreshed.

Gently replenishes dry skin with soothing hydration to leave it feeling soft, smooth, and refreshed. This treatment helps restore balance and comfort while giving the skin a healthy, natural glow - perfect for everyday care or a quick pick-me-up.
Thoroughly cleanses and detoxifies to clear congestion and refine pores. Leaves the skin feeling clean, balanced, and refreshed with a smooth, healthy-looking finish.

A calming facial designed for delicate, easily irritated skin. Gently cleanses and hydrates while reducing redness and strengthening the skin’s natural barrier. Infused with soothing botanicals and anti-inflammatory ingredients to leave the complexion soft, balanced, and comforted.
Designed to calm inflamed skin, reduce acne lesions, and fade acne scars. Includes deep cleansing and specialized healing serums to support skin recovery and strengthen its barrier.

A luxurious firming treatment that mimics the effects of Bo-tox using peptides to smooth fine lines and enhance skin elasticity. Ideal for those seeking a lifted, more sculpted facial contour without
injections.
An organic facial treatment featuring cooling botanical extracts and glacier water to deeply hydrate and soothe the skin. Perfect for sensitive or dry skin seeking calmness and lasting moisture.

Infuses the skin with high concentrations of hyaluronic acid to lock in moisture, plump up skin, and restore its natural glow. Perfect for dehydrated or tired-looking skin in need of a radiance boost.

Targets redness, irritation, and skin sensitivity with gentle, soothing ingredients. Strengthens the skin’s natural defenses and restores comfort, making it ideal for rosacea-prone or post-treatment skin.
Harnesses the power of marine botanical to draw out toxins, regulate sebum, and clear congested pores. Helps reduce breakouts, blackheads, and inflammation while restoring skin clarity.

This anti-aging facial uses tri-peptides and collagen-boosting actives to stimulate skin regeneration, improve firmness, and enhance resilience. Especially suitable for mature or sagging
skin.
Enriched with stabilized vitamin C, this facial targets dullness and uneven skin tone. It helps to brighten, lighten pigmentation, and leave the skin looking luminous, refreshed, and clear.
A renewing facial that uses professional-grade exfoliating acids to smooth uneven tone, refine pores, and restore clarity. Leaves the skin soft, bright, and refreshed with a luminous, youthful glow.

An advanced rejuvenation treatment powered by #b{SMTS Bio-Crystal Peptide technology}. This luxurious mask infuses skin with potent peptides and moisture-binding ingredients that enhance elasticity, restore volume, and deliver a radiant, glass-skin glow. Ideal for tired, dehydrated, or aging complexions seeking instant lift and luminosity.

An indulgent anti-aging treatment infused with Biodroga’s Golden Caviar complex, rich in amino
acids, minerals, and vitamins. This facial deeply nourishes and revitalizes mature or dry skin,
boosting elasticity and firmness while promoting cell renewal. Skin appears smoother, plumper, and illuminated with a luminous, youthful glow.

An advanced resurfacing treatment that gently exfoliates with a fine diamond or crystal tip to
remove dull surface cells. Improves texture, softens fine lines, and enhances product absorption,
revealing a smoother, more radiant complexion with minimal downtime.

Upgrade your facial with the Reedle Shot, a revolutionary microchanneling treatment that
enhances serum penetration, boosts collagen production, and refines skin texture and
tone. This needle-free innovation creates microscopic channels to stimulate regeneration
without discomfort.

A powerful age-defense treatment designed to slow visible signs of aging and protect skin vitality.
Featuring Biodroga’s innovative Slow Age Complex with black forest rose extract and plant stem
cells, this facial enhances cellular renewal, improves elasticity, and strengthens the skin barrier. The
result is a rejuvenated, supple complexion that radiates timeless beauty.

Enjoy a head spa infused with personalized essential oils. Combines a moisturizing hair mask,
scalp steaming, gentle massage, temple release, and neck relaxation to calm your nervous
system and uplift your mood.

A revitalizing scalp detox that removes buildup and impurities while relaxing your mind.
Includes scalp analysis, exfoliation, deep cleanse, and head massage.

Ideal for dry, flaky, or sensitive scalps. This treatment includes a moisturizing hair mask,
hydrating serum

A results-driven treatment using red light therapy, a moisturizing hair mask, massage, and
gentle stimulation techniques to awaken hair follicles and support healthy hair growth.

displayName: Signature Botanical Bloom Head Spa + Mini Facial
description:
Immerse yourself in nature with this gentle and grounding head spa treatment featuring
selected flowers. Includes:$l{Flower-infused scalp exfoliation,Premium hair mask,Essential oil floral massage,Deep scalp hydration}This sensory experience calms the mind, improves scalp health, and leaves your hair delicately
scented with nature’s beauty.

A gentle massage using personalized essential oil blends to calm the mind, boost
immunity, or uplift your mood.
Traditional method using cups to increase blood flow and release muscle tension.

Targets deeper layers of muscle and fascia to relieve chronic pain, knots, and stiffness.
Ideal for active lifestyles or desk fatigue.

Heated volcanic stones are used to relax the muscles and balance energy. Excellent for
those who love warmth and relaxation.

A full-body massage using long, flowing strokes to melt away tension and promote total
relaxation.

A precision brow treatment that smooths and sets each hair into perfect alignment for a fuller, more
defined look. This semi-permanent styling enhances natural shape, adds lift, and creates a polished,
feathery finish that lasts for weeks.

Enhance your natural lashes with a gentle lifting treatment that adds lasting curl, length, and
definition—no extensions needed. This low-maintenance beauty boost opens up the eyes and delivers a
naturally elegant, wide-awake look for up to 6–8 weeks.
